Gabriel Granjo
About Research CV
Amazonas, Brazil · Photo by Guilherme Horta Lima

Welcome! I am an incoming MPhil student in Comparative Government at Nuffield College, University of Oxford. I study the comparative political economy of development with a focus on environmental politics and criminal governance in Latin America. I received a Bachelor of Science in International Relations with a minor in Data Science from Fundação Getulio Vargas (FGV) in 2023. Since 2024, I serve as a research analyst at the Global Initiative Against Transnational Organized Crime, working on a multi-year project that uses new technologies to monitor and combat environmental crime.

Contact: gabriel.granjo [at] fgv.br
